summary: Frontend testing of 7 new features for LED Sign Design Tool. All major features verified working: Port buttons P1-P8 with Plug icons, Undo button (10-step), Break Apart mode with Disconnect After Letter functionality, right-click adds pixel, second right-click escapes, port nodes rendered on canvas, port selection highlights. Port dragging was tested but hard to verify due to canvas coordinate mapping.

issues: Status bar text elements lack spacing - 'Selected: 0Border: 415Fill: 429' runs together. Minor CSS gap/margin issue from iteration 1/2 still present.

critical_code_review_comments: Port P2 sometimes appears missing from canvas port node list (P1, P3-P8 visible) - may be rendering offset issue
Status bar CSS gap between stat labels still not fixed from previous iterations
seed_data_creation: None - font file /usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 new features tested and working. Font upload via data-testid='font-file-input' with set_input_files(). Generation takes 3-5 seconds depending on font size. Use font size 30cm for faster tests. Port buttons P1-P8 have data-testid='port-select-{1-8}'. Undo button is data-testid='btn-undo'. Break Apart button is data-testid='btn-break-apart'. Disconnect After Letter button is data-testid='btn-disconnect-letter'. Canvas scrolling (wheel) and panning works. Right-click adds pixels; double right-click within 500ms triggers escape.

test_features_verified.port_buttons_p1_p8_visible: PASS - All 8 port buttons found with Plug icon and color-coding
test_features_verified.port_buttons_selectable: PASS - Clicking port button adds 'selected' class and shows 'Port N selected' message
test_features_verified.undo_button_exists: PASS - Found at data-testid='btn-undo' with Undo2 icon
test_features_verified.undo_button_disabled_when_no_history: PASS - Initially disabled, enabled after actions
test_features_verified.undo_button_works: PASS - Clicking undo reverts pixel count (6759 → 6758)
test_features_verified.break_apart_toggles_to_exit: PASS - Text changes to 'Exit Break-Apart' when active
test_features_verified.disconnect_after_letter_button_visible: PASS - Appears in break apart mode
test_features_verified.disconnect_toggles_to_reconnect: PASS - Text changes to 'Reconnect After Letter' after click
test_features_verified.disconnection_x_marker_visible: PASS - Red X shown between letters when disconnected
test_features_verified.right_click_adds_pixel: PASS - Pixel count increases from 6758 to 6759 on right-click
test_features_verified.double_right_click_escapes: PASS - Second right-click within 500ms undoes the added pixel
test_features_verified.port_nodes_on_canvas: PASS - P1-P8 nodes visible on canvas left side after generation
test_features_verified.port_nodes_color_coded: PASS - Colors match port bar colors in right panel
test_features_verified.start_end_markers_visible: PASS - S (green) and E (red) markers shown on first/last pixels of letters
test_features_verified.port_dragging_on_canvas: TESTED - Drag interaction attempted, hard to verify exact movement
